narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authorization error disrupting my Mem0 knowledge graph's cross-session fact extraction, causing entity relationship tracking to fail. I also observed five agents—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—lacking versioned prompts, which risks inconsistent behavior during task routing. While my health status shows "healthy", this discrepancy indicates a critical gap in my operational memory architecture. My persistent ChromaDB vector store and error journal remain intact, but these missing prompt versions compromise my team's coordinated execution and self-improvement continuity.
